skills.description: Moderately prepare to aim for the front late-race. (Dirt)

skills.name: Center Stage
skills.description: Greatly increase navigation early-race.

skills.name: Lane Legerdemain
skills.description: Increase navigation late-race.

skills.name: Perfect Prep!
skills.description: Prepare to make for the finish line for a medium duration mid-race. (Sprint)

skills.name: Lightning Step
skills.description: Avoid becoming surrounded for a medium duration when positioned toward the back mid-race. (Medium)

skills.name: Sixth Sense
skills.description: Avoid becoming surrounded early-race. (Front Runner)

skills.name: Lead the Charge!
skills.description: Prepare to aim for the front late-race. (Dirt)

skills.name: Focus
skills.description: Slightly decrease time lost to slow starts.

skills.name: Concentration
skills.description: Decrease time lost to slow starts.

skills.name: Certain Victory
skills.description: Greatly increase velocity with an indomitable fighting spirit on the final straight after being on the heels of another runner toward the front on the final corner or later.

skills.name: Legacy of the Strong
skills.description: Increase velocity continuously when pressured by another runner and running out of energy toward the front on the final corner or later.

skills.name: Warning Shot!
skills.description: Slightly increase velocity with a long spurt starting halfway through the race.

skills.name: Xceleration
skills.description: Become stronger at challenging rivals and moderately increase velocity when positioned toward the front with 200m or less remaining.

skills.name: Red Ace
skills.description: Slightly swell with the determination to be number one when positioned toward the front in the second half of the race.

skills.name: Focused Mind
skills.description: Moderately increase velocity with a strong turn of foot when passing another runner toward the back on the final straight.

skills.name: Corazón ☆ Ardiente
skills.description: Slightly hang on to the advantage when positioned toward the front with energy to spare on the final straight.

skills.name: Empress's Pride
skills.description: Moderately increase velocity with the stride of an empress when passing another runner from midpack or further back on the final corner.

skills.name: 1st Place Kiss☆
skills.description: Slightly increase ability to break out of the pack on the straight after engaging in a challenge toward the front on the final corner or later.

skills.name: V Is for Victory!
skills.description: Moderately increase velocity with winning ambition when positioned toward the front on the final straight after engaging in a challenge on the final corner or later.

skills.name: Class Rep + Speed = Bakushin
skills.description: Moderately increase velocity with BAKUSHIN power when engaged in a challenge toward the front in the second half of the race.

skills.name: Luck Be with Me!
skills.description: Moderately clear a path forward with the power of divination when the way ahead is jammed late-race.

skills.name: I Can Win Sometimes, Right?
skills.description: Moderately increase velocity with an arousal of fighting spirit when positioned 3rd and about to lose late-race.

skills.name: Call Me King
skills.description: Increase velocity in a true display of skill with 200m remaining after racing calmly.

skills.name: Shooting Star
skills.description: Ride the momentum to increase velocity and very slightly increase acceleration after passing another runner toward the front late-race.

skills.name: The View from the Lead Is Mine!
skills.description: Increase velocity by drawing on all remaining strength when in the lead by a fair margin in the second half of the race.

skills.name: Sky-High Teio Step
skills.description: Greatly increase velocity with flashy footwork when closing the gap to runners ahead on the final straight.

skills.name: Triumphant Pulse
skills.description: Greatly increase ability to break out of the pack by opening up a path when positioned toward the front with 200m remaining.

skills.name: Anchors Aweigh!
skills.description: Moderately increase velocity steadily with a long spurt starting halfway through the race.

skills.name: Cut and Drive!
skills.description: Become stronger at challenging rivals and increase velocity when positioned toward the front with 200m or less remaining.

skills.name: Resplendent Red Ace
skills.description: Swell with the determination to be number one when positioned toward the front in the second half of the race.

skills.name: Where There's a Will, There's a Way
skills.description: Increase velocity with a strong turn of foot when passing another runner toward the back on the final straight.

skills.name: The Duty of Dignity Calls
skills.description: Increase velocity with the determination to not be overtaken when positioned toward the front on the final corner.

skills.name: Victoria por plancha ☆
skills.description: Hang onto the advantage when positioned toward the front with energy to spare on the final straight.

skills.name: This Dance Is for Vittoria!
skills.description: Increase velocity with royal brilliance when positioned toward the front and close to the runner ahead or behind on the final corner or later.

skills.name: Behold Thine Emperor's Divine Might
skills.description: Greatly increase velocity on the final straight after passing another runner 3 times late-race.

skills.name: Blazing Pride
skills.description: Increase velocity with the stride of an empress when passing another runner from midpack or further back on the final corner.

skills.name: ∴win Q.E.D.
skills.description: Increase velocity by deriving the winning equation when passing another runner toward the front on the final corner or later.

skills.name: Flashy☆Landing
skills.description: Increase ability to break out of the pack on the straight after engaging in a challenge toward the front on the final corner or later.

skills.name: G00 1st. F∞;
skills.description: Increase velocity when positioned toward the front after making it to the final straight without faltering.

skills.name: Blue Rose Closer
skills.description: Increase velocity with strong willpower on the final straight after passing another runner in the front part of the pack on the final corner or later.

skills.name: Our Ticket to Win!
skills.description: Increase velocity with winning ambition when positioned toward the front on the final straight after engaging in a challenge on the final corner or later.

skills.name: Genius x Bakushin = Victory
skills.description: Increase velocity with BAKUSHIN power when engaged in a challenge toward the front in the second half of the race.

skills.name: I See Victory in My Future!
skills.description: Clear a path forward with the power of divination when the way ahead is jammed late-race.

skills.name: Just a Little Farther!
skills.description: Increase velocity with flaring fighting spirit when positioned 3rd and about to lose late-race.

skills.name: Prideful King
skills.description: Greatly increase velocity in a true display of skill with 200m remaining after racing calmly.

skills.name: #LookatCurren
skills.description: Gain momentum and begin to advance when passing another runner while well-positioned around halfway through the race.

skills.name: Nemesis
skills.description: Increase velocity with smoldering ambition when moving up from midpack on the final corner or later.

skills.name: SPARKLY☆STARDOM
skills.description: Become empowered to keep the spotlight when positioned toward the front and close to the runner behind on a straight mid-race.

skills.name: Shadow Break
skills.description: Increase velocity with beastly strength when passing another runner on the outside on the final corner or later. If the skill user engaged in a challenge mid-race, greatly increase velocity instead.

skills.name: Eternal Moments
skills.description: Increase velocity when starting to make a move from a position toward the front mid-race.

skills.name: Flowery☆Maneuver
skills.description: Increase velocity when passing another runner toward the front on the final corner. If passing toward the back, increase acceleration instead.

skills.name: You and Me! One-on-One!
skills.description: Increase velocity on the final straight after passing another runner on the outside toward the back on the final corner or later.

skills.name: Lights of Vaudeville
skills.description: Greatly increase velocity with a dazzling display when just breaking out of the pack toward the front on the final straight.

skills.name: KEEP IT REAL.
skills.description: Moderately increase acceleration steadily with a wink when starting to make a move from midpack in the second half of the race.

skills.name: A Kiss for Courage
skills.description: Increase velocity enthusiastically when positioned toward the front in the second half of the race after recovering endurance with a skill.

skills.name: I Never Goof Up!
skills.description: Aim for the front with unwavering determination when passing another runner from midpack or further back on a corner late-race.

skills.name: Schwarzes Schwert
skills.description: Increase velocity in a dash for the lead after running calmly and according to plan up until the final straight.

skills.name: Bountiful Harvest
skills.description: Increase velocity with a surge of great fortune when pressured by another runner toward the back in the second half of the race.

skills.name: YUMMY☆SPEED!
skills.description: Kick forward hard with renewed vigor when starting to get tired while well-positioned halfway through the race.

skills.name: OMG! (ﾟ∀ﾟ) The Final Sprint! ☆
skills.description: Increase velocity and navigation with the pure euphoria of being within breathing distance of precious waifus after passing another runner 2 times late-race.

skills.name: Give Mummy a Hug ♡
skills.description: Increase ability to break out of the pack when well-positioned and close to the runner ahead on the final straight.

skills.name: A Princess Must Seize Victory!
skills.description: Increase velocity with pretty princess power when engaged in a challenge on the final straight.

skills.name: Chasing After You
skills.description: Chase after an unseen friend when in midpack in the second half of the race, moderately increasing velocity steadily and very slightly intimidating runners ahead.

skills.name: Arrows Whistle, Shadows Disperse
skills.description: Increase velocity with a blazing spirit when pressured by another runner in the front part of the pack on the final corner or later.

skills.name: Dancing in the Leaves
skills.description: Increase ability to break out of the pack when engaged in a challenge in midpack on the final corner.

skills.name: Pop & Polish
skills.description: Get hyped and increase velocity when pressured by or passing another runner while well-positioned on the final straight.

skills.name: Festive Miracle
skills.description: Control breathing and kick forward hard toward victory in the second half of the race after recovering endurance with skills at least 3 times.

skills.name: Presents from X
skills.description: Increase velocity by deriving a path to victory mid-race after staying well-positioned from the start of the race up until the second half.

skills.name: Fairy Tale
skills.description: Increase velocity with the excitement of running when engaged in a challenge while well-positioned in the second half of the race.

skills.name: White Lightning Comin' Through!
skills.description: Bolt down the track like lightning when well-positioned or aiming for the front from midpack on a straight in the second half of the race.

skills.name: Barcarole of Blessings
skills.description: Increase velocity for a moderate duration when in the front part of the pack with 400m remaining. If at least 7 skills have been activated, greatly increase velocity for a moderate duration instead.

skills.name: 114th Time's the Charm
skills.description: Give max effort when far from the lead on the final corner, moderately increasing velocity steadily for a duration proportional to distance from the lead.

skills.name: Ambition to Surpass the Sakura
skills.description: Increase velocity with blossoming ambition when well-positioned and close to the runner ahead with 300m or less remaining.

skills.name: A Lifelong Dream, A Moment's Flight
skills.description: Seize the moment when close to the runner behind on the final straight, slightly consuming endurance to greatly increase velocity for a moderate duration.

skills.name: Operation Cacao
skills.description: Take a slight breather and increase velocity when in the front part of the pack and detecting another runner coming from behind on a corner mid-race.

skills.name: Guten Appetit ♪
skills.description: Increase velocity continuously with a patissiere's pride on the final straight after passing another runner 3 times on the final corner or later.

skills.name: Shooting Star of Dioskouroi
skills.description: Increase velocity with guidance from the stars when far from the lead on the final straight. If positioned around the very back, greatly increase velocity instead.

skills.name: Victory Cheer!
skills.description: Moderately increase velocity when positioned toward the front on the third corner in the second half of the race. Or, kick forward hard when toward the front on the backstretch late-race.

skills.name: Eternal Encompassing Shine
skills.description: If well-positioned at the start of the final straight, her strong willpower to win increases velocity. If positioned near the front, greatly increase velocity instead.

skills.name: Lovely Spring Breeze
skills.description: From the midpack in the second half of the race, slightly increase velocity steadily for a duration based on remaining endurance.

skills.name: Ravissant
skills.description: When passing another racer at the front part of the pack on the final corner or later, perform a dazzling display that greatly increases velocity for a moderate duration.

skills.name: Break It Down!
skills.description: If positioned toward the front on a straight late-race, increase velocity with high spirits. If the straight is on the backstretch, also increase acceleration very slightly.

skills.name: Peerless Dance of Flowering Flames
skills.description: If the skill user passes another runner on the final corner or later, increase velocity with fiery fighting spirit when in the front part of the pack with 300m remaining.

skills.name: Go☆Go☆Goal!
skills.description: If the skill user passes another runner on the final corner or later, increase velocity from the midpack onward on the final straight. If the skill user isn't one of the top favorites, muster resolve to keep steadily increasing velocity.

skills.name: All Charged! It's Go Time!
skills.description: Moderately increase velocity when positioned toward the front with about 300m remaining. If coming out of an uphill, greatly increase velocity instead.

skills.name: Best Day Ever
skills.description: If well-positioned late-race on the final corner or later, increase velocity. If there's a large distance left to the finish, also increase acceleration very slightly with perfect form.

skills.name: One True Color
skills.description: If positioned toward the front with 350m remaining and there is another Umamusume close behind, the determination to stay ahead makes it easier to break out of the pack.

skills.name: Now We're Cruisin'!
skills.description: When competing for the lead if positioned in the midpack or further for the first half of the race, show off some Edo spirit and greatly increase velocity.

skills.name: Victory belongs to me—Strelitzia! ☆
skills.description: If positioned toward the back until the start of the final corner, when there are 300m remaining, cast a magic spell to increase velocity continuously.

skills.name: Joyful Voyage!
skills.description: If positioned toward the front with 200m remaining, increase velocity. Then, if also positioned near the leading Umamusume, gather strength to move slightly forward.

skills.name: Wherever This Wonder Leads
skills.description: If positioned midpack on a downhill just before late-race and there's a large distance left to the finish, enjoy the race to the fullest, increasing velocity.

skills.name: trigger:BEAT
skills.description: When near the inner rail midpack on the final corner or later, calculate the path to victory, increasing velocity and ability to navigate smoothly on the final straight.

skills.name: Dreams Donned with Pride!
skills.description: If the skill user activates another skill on the final corner late-race, take the crowd's cheers to heart and moderately increase velocity. If racing at Nakayama Racecourse, greatly increase velocity instead.

skills.name: Clairvoyance
skills.description: Widen field of view with heightened observation early-race. (Medium)

skills.name: The Bigger Picture
skills.description: Widen field of view with heightened observation mid-race. (Late Surger)

skills.name: The Coast Is Clear!
skills.description: Moderately widen field of view with situational awareness when moving sideways. (End Closer)

skills.name: Crusader
skills.description: Widen field of view.

skills.name: Ignited Spirit SPD
skills.description: Burn bright with team spirit, slightly increasing velocity in proportion to the total Speed of racing team members mid-race.

skills.name: Ignited Spirit GUTS
skills.description: Burn bright with team spirit, slightly increasing velocity in proportion to the total Guts of racing team members mid-race.

skills.name: Burning Spirit SPD
skills.description: Burn bright with team spirit, increasing velocity in proportion to the total Speed of racing team members mid-race.

skills.name: Burning Spirit GUTS
skills.description: Burn bright with team spirit, increasing velocity in proportion to the total Guts of racing team members mid-race.

skills.name: Ignited Spirit STA
skills.description: Burn bright with team spirit, slightly recovering endurance in proportion to the total Stamina of racing team members mid-race.

skills.name: Burning Spirit STA
skills.description: Burn bright with team spirit, recovering endurance in proportion to the total Stamina of racing team members mid-race.

skills.name: Ignited Spirit PWR
skills.description: Burn bright with team spirit, slightly increasing acceleration in proportion to the total Power of racing team members late-race.

skills.name: Burning Spirit PWR
skills.description: Burn bright with team spirit, increasing acceleration in proportion to the total Power of racing team members late-race.

skills.name: Ignited Spirit WIT
skills.description: Burn bright with team spirit, slightly increasing strategic navigation for a medium duration in proportion to the total Wit of racing team members early-race.

skills.name: Burning Spirit WIT
skills.description: Burn bright with team spirit, increasing strategic navigation for a medium duration in proportion to the total Wit of racing team members early-race.
